metadata.description: A unique prefix for all resources in this deployment. This should be 3-20 characters long:
Optional: Existing Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID
Use this parameter to use an existing AI project resource ID
Optional. created by user name
Choose the programming language:
Industry use case for deployment:
Secondary location for databases creation(example:eastus2):
Location for AI services deployment. This is the location where the Search service resource will be deployed.
GPT model deployment type:
Name of the GPT model to deploy:
Version of the GPT model to deploy:
Capacity of the GPT deployment:
Name of the Text Embedding model to deploy:
Capacity of the Embedding Model deployment
Deploy the application components (Cosmos DB, API, Frontend). Set to true to deploy the app.
Set to true for workshop deployment with sample data and simplified configuration.
Set to true to deploy Azure SQL Server, otherwise Fabric SQL is used.
Location for AI Foundry deployment. This is the location where the AI Foundry resources will be deployed.
Name of the Azure Container Registry
The principal type of the deploying user. Use ServicePrincipal for CI/CD pipelines with OIDC.

variables.landingText: [if(equals(parameters('usecase'), 'Retail-sales-analysis'), 'You can ask questions around sales, products and orders.', 'You can ask questions around customer policies, claims and communications.')]

properties.tags: [shallowMerge(createArray(resourceGroup().tags, createObject('TemplateName', 'Unified Data Analysis Agents', 'CreatedBy', parameters('createdBy'), 'DeploymentName', deployment().name)))]

metadata.description: Solution Name
Solution Location
Name
The managed identity details including id, objectId, clientId, and name.
The backend app managed identity details including id, objectId, clientId, and name.
The name of the solution, used as a base for naming all resources.
The Azure region where resources will be deployed.
The deployment type for the GPT model (e.g., Standard, GlobalStandard).
The name of the GPT model to deploy (e.g., gpt-4o, gpt-4).
The version of the GPT model to deploy.
The capacity (in thousands of tokens per minute) for the GPT model deployment.
The name of the embedding model to deploy.
The capacity for the embedding model deployment.
The object ID of the managed identity to assign roles to.
The resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace. If empty, a new one will be created.
The resource ID of an existing Azure AI Foundry project. If provided, the existing project will be used instead of creating a new one.
The principal ID of the user deploying the solution, used for role assignments.
The principal type of the deploying user. Use ServicePrincipal for CI/CD pipelines with OIDC.
Tags to apply to all resources.
Location for AI services deployment. This is the location where the Search service resource will be deployed.
When true, deploys additional resources for workshop scenarios including AI Search and Storage.

variables.aiModelDeployments: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', parameters('gptModelName'), 'model', parameters('gptModelName'), 'sku', createObject('name', parameters('deploymentType'), 'capacity', parameters('gptDeploymentCapacity')), 'version', parameters('gptModelVersion'), 'raiPolicyName', 'Microsoft.Default')), if(parameters('isWorkshop'), createArray(createObject('name', parameters('embeddingModel'), 'model', parameters('embeddingModel'), 'sku', createObject('name', 'GlobalStandard', 'capacity', parameters('embeddingDeploymentCapacity')), 'raiPolicyName', 'Microsoft.Default')), createArray()))]
